Author: WonderlandDev
Name: Wind-Up Key (Testing)
Punchline: Testing build — unwind, add wind, and optional self-pair for self-wind.
Description: Testing channel build with debug helpers: Unwind / Add 1h wind in settings. Pair with your own key to enable self-wind from the context menu. Other players can still wind you normally. When time runs out, movement and teleport are locked. Remaining time is shown only to the person who wound you.
